name: Trafalgar Law (002)
effect_text: [Activate:Main] [Once Per Turn] (2) (You may rest the specified number of DON!! cards in your cost area.): If you have 5 Characters, return 1 of your Characters to your hand. Then, play up to 1 Character with a cost of 5 or less from your hand that is a different color than the returned Character.  This card has been officially errata'd.
